rationale: In the citing paper, Stephen and Galak (2012) is cited only once as part of a long grouped list of prior multichannel/marketing studies in the introduction. The text does not discuss that paper's specific findings, mechanisms, measures, or methods, and it is not tied to any hypothesis, model component, or empirical benchmark in this study. The citation functions as broad background positioning rather than a distinct intellectual input to the paper's core attribution model.
